title: Senior Teacher - Ratna Sagar - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Ratna Sagar - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
